seo.title: Explore Topics & Reviews | Invoicemonk
seo.description: Explore our comprehensive topic guides, read customer reviews, and track your learning progress. Master invoicing, payments, and business finance.

hero.title: Explore & Learn
hero.subtitle: Navigate our comprehensive knowledge base, see what others are saying, and track your learning journey.

faqs.question: What topics can I explore?
faqs.answer: Our knowledge base covers invoicing, getting paid, business finances, tax compliance, freelancing, and proposals & estimates. Each topic has comprehensive guides and related articles.

faqs.question: Can I leave a review?
faqs.answer: Yes! Visit the Reviews tab to share your experience with Invoicemonk. Your feedback helps other business owners make informed decisions.

faqs.question: How is content organized?
faqs.answer: Content is organized into topic clusters following a pillar-and-spoke model. Each pillar topic has related supporting articles that go deeper into specific aspects.

reviews.title: Customer Reviews
reviews.noReviewsSubtitle: Be the first to share your experience with Invoicemonk

reviewForm.title: Share Your Experience
reviewForm.subtitle: Your feedback helps other businesses make informed decisions
reviewForm.reviewPlaceholder: Tell us about your experience with Invoicemonk. What do you like most? How has it helped your business?
reviewForm.thankYouMessage: Your review has been submitted and is pending approval.
reviewForm.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields
reviewForm.submitError: Failed to submit review. Please try again.
reviewForm.disclaimer: By submitting, you agree to our review guidelines. Reviews are moderated before publishing.

analyticsDashboard.title: Content Analytics
analyticsDashboard.subtitle: Track your reading progress and content engagement
analyticsDashboard.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all analytics data? This cannot be undone.
analyticsDashboard.trackProgress: Track your progress through curated reading paths
analyticsDashboard.startReading: Start reading articles to see your progress
analyticsDashboard.clickLinksToTrack: Click links in articles to see tracking data
